examples.title: Pseudocode: Naive Bayes Classifier
examples.description: A simple Naive Bayes classifier to demonstrate probability-based learning
examples.code:
ALGORITHM NaiveBayesClassifier
INPUT: Training data X, labels Y
OUTPUT: Predicted class label for new instance

BEGIN
 # Calculate prior probabilities for each class
 FOR EACH class label y IN Y
 prior[y] = COUNT(y) / TOTAL_INSTANCES

 # Calculate conditional probabilities for each feature
 FOR EACH feature x IN X
 FOR EACH class label y IN Y
 conditional[x, y] = COUNT(x, y) / COUNT(y)

 # Predict class label for new instance
 FOR EACH new instance
 score = prior[y] * PRODUCT(conditional[x, y] FOR EACH feature x)
 RETURN class label with highest score
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates the basic steps of a Naive Bayes classifier, including calculating prior probabilities, conditional probabilities, and making predictions based on these probabilities.

examples.title: Python: Naive Bayes Classifier

examples.explanation: This Python implementation demonstrates a simple Naive Bayes classifier using NumPy. It calculates prior probabilities and conditional probabilities, then makes predictions based on these probabilities.
